# Github Copilot Instructions for HTML & CSS Projects

## Prerequisites

## How to use Github Copilot for this project:

1. Create a new react project in this existing folder.
   Follow this installations guide from this link:
   `npx create-react-router@latest my-react-router-app`

2. And Please follow this folder structure from this link: https://github.com/alan2207/bulletproof-react/blob/master/docs/project-structure.md

3. Install prettier as dev dependencies `npm install --save-dev --save-exact prettier `
4. Create a .prettierrc file add rules {
   tabWidth: 2,
   singleQuote: true,
   printWidth: 100
   }
